summary: Iteration 4 frontend testing complete. Verified all 9 UI features on /board and /heatmap. All targeted flows pass with zero console errors.
passed: Board header shows 'Daily Resource Scheduling Board' with 'Updated just now' timestamp (data-testid=updated-label)
Refresh button (refresh-btn) triggers re-fetch; updated-label resets to 'Updated just now'
Screenshot button (screenshot-btn) exists and clicking triggers html2canvas with zero JS errors
TV Mode: tv-mode-btn navigates to ?tv=1 URL and app-sidebar is hidden; Exit TV removes tv=1 and sidebar reappears
Left column header displays 'Area' (not 'Row Name'); all row headers rendered UPPERCASE (e.g., 'P&C ASSEMBLY', 'SUB ASSEMBLY - 1', 'PRE-PACKING', 'TROLLEY')
Support Ops column header present (col-header-support); enlarged font sizes (text-sm) applied per source
/heatmap loads: Skill Heatmap title, heatmap-grid table, stats (Cells=67, Well Covered=62, Fragile=1, Critical=4), red cells visible for critical (0/1) combinations
Top Training Opportunities section renders with 5 training rows and suggested trainee chips
Zero console errors on Board and Heatmap loads
